title: Mouse Extermination in Newark, NJ | $350-$600
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination services in Newark, NJ starting at $350. Fast, effective rodent removal for homes and businesses. Licensed experts serving Newark area.
intro: Dealing with a mouse infestation in Newark? Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive mouse extermination services throughout Newark, New Jersey, with pricing ranging from $350 to $600 depending on the severity of your infestation. Our licensed technicians provide fast, effective rodent removal to protect your home or business from the health risks and property damage mice can cause.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving the Newark metro area with proven mouse control solutions. We offer same-day service, use safe and effective treatment methods, and provide warranties on our work to ensure your property remains rodent-free.
localContext: Newark's mix of historic Victorian homes in the Ironbound, high-rise apartments downtown, and classic brick row houses creates numerous entry points where mice seek shelter, especially during New Jersey's cold winters. From properties near Branch Brook Park to businesses along Broad Street, we understand the unique pest control challenges Newark's diverse architecture presents.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Newark, NJ?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Newark typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Newark?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Newark and surrounding areas. Once you contact us, we can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment immediately if needed.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, sealing of access points, removal of contaminated materials, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We also provide prevention recommendations to keep mice from returning.

faqs.question: Are your mouse control methods safe for families and pets in Newark homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and we'll explain all safety measures during your service.
